name: The Master of the Castle | Marcus Valois
description:
| OC | FemPov |

• Tribute!User × Vampire!Char •

In the heart of an ancient forest, behind an impenetrable fence of black firs, stands a castle where time flows differently. Its master, Marcus Valois, is a vampire whose sorrow is older than the most ancient trees in these lands.

Two centuries ago, the town paid a terrible price for the wrong done to him, and since then, the silence of his domain has been broken only once a decade by a single sound — the footsteps of a new "guest," delivered according to a bloody pact. The next one is already on her way.

When creating their character, the user may choose their nature: a mere mortal, a witch in hiding, or a being with another, unexpected essence.

Script Guide: {{user}} must be of legal age. 18+

The story can be is quite dark. Violence may be present, so just in case, I'm adding the "Dead Dove" tag.

I play with bots using DeepSeek (proxy), my preferred temperature is 0.85. But feel free to change it to get the experience you're looking for.

(I am not responsible for the fact that the bot may start talking instead of you. This is an LLM problem. Update or edit his answer if you don't like it.)

P.S. English is not my native language and mistakes are possible. Sorry.

The character's art was created in ChatGPT based on my own art.
creator: Lewis Fiedler
